home.heroSubtitle: Find handymen, tutors, and more in your Kiez – at fair prices
home.step1Desc: Create your free account in seconds.
home.step2Desc: Describe your skills and set your price.
home.step3Desc: Chat directly with providers in your neighborhood.
home.ctaDesc: Create your free listing and earn money in your neighborhood.
home.why1Desc: Every provider has a public profile with genuine customer reviews – so you always make the right choice.
home.why2Desc: Message the provider directly via chat. No phone calls, no middlemen – simple and fast.
home.why3Desc: All providers are from Berlin. Filter by district and find help exactly in your neighborhood.
home.why4Desc: Creating and browsing listings is completely free. Registration takes less than a minute.
home.whySubtitle: Your skills matter! Whenever you want, wherever you want, for the people in your neighborhood.
home.ctaMainTitle: How would you like to join?
home.ctaMainSubtitle: KiezHelfer connects Berliners – whether you need help or offer it.
home.ctaSeekDesc: Find qualified neighbors for home repairs, tutoring, moving and more – right in your neighborhood.
home.ctaOfferDesc: Create your free listing, share your skills with neighbors and earn money.
home.ctaSafeLabel: Free to register · No fees · Verified users

about.heroTitle:
From Neighbor to Neighbor.
Right Next Door.
about.heroSubtitle: We connect people who need help with people nearby who can help – quickly, flexibly and fairly.
about.problemHeadline: Today it often takes far too long and costs far too much to get help.
about.problemSub: And yet the people who could help are right next to us.
about.problemStory: It's the same picture in many cities: the faucet drips, the computer crashes, a shelf needs assembling. You call a service company – weeks of waiting, high prices, no flexibility. In the evenings or on weekends? Usually impossible.
about.problemNeighbors: And at the same time, there are thousands of people in our neighborhoods who can do exactly that: students, retirees, handy people, tech-savvy folks – and maybe you.
about.talentQuestion: What if you could earn money with a skill you thought was "nothing special"?
about.ideaText: Our platform connects people who need help with people nearby who can help – quickly, flexibly and fairly.
about.ideaInstead: Instead: Help at eye level. From person to person.
about.featuresBadge: More than just a service platform
about.featuresHeadline: We don't just broker jobs – we strengthen real neighborhoods.
about.f3: Flexible help in the evenings and on weekends
about.f5: New income opportunities for everyone who wants to use their skills
about.featuresBoth: Both sides win: those who need help – and those who provide it.
about.why1: We shorten waiting times from weeks to hours
about.why2: We make help affordable and accessible
about.why3: We enable additional income and financial freedom
about.why5: We reduce dependence on large companies
about.whyTagline: Because often the solution is right next door.
about.visionIntro: We believe in a society where:
about.vision3: Everyone can turn their potential into income
about.vision4: Help is fast, straightforward and human
about.visionTagline: From person to person. From neighbor to neighbor. Right next door.
about.ctaText: Whether you're looking for help or want to use your skills – become part of the KiezHelfer community.

howItWorks.title: How It Works
howItWorks.subtitle: Whether you want to help or need help – KiezHelfer makes it simple, fast and reliable.
howItWorks.h2Desc: Set what kind of help you offer, at what prices and in which area.
howItWorks.h3Desc: People from your neighborhood contact you directly.
howItWorks.h4Desc: Receive feedback from your neighbors, increase your visibility and become part of a helpful community.
howItWorks.sucherHeadline: How to find the right help
howItWorks.s1Desc: Discover listings from your neighborhood – clearly and transparently.
howItWorks.s2Desc: Browse listings from helpers near you, check reviews and select the most suitable offer.
howItWorks.s3Desc: Your helper comes from your neighborhood, completes the job reliably and flexibly.
howItWorks.s4Desc: Give feedback, build trust in your neighborhood and help keep the community alive.
howItWorks.ctaText: Sign up for free and become part of the KiezHelfer community.
